tier_1.title: Blizzard
tier_1.description: The temperature drops without warning. Visibility collapses to arm's length. Wind cuts through every layer.
tier_1.success: You dig a snow shelter in time. The night is cold but survivable.
tier_1.failure: Hours exposed before shelter is found. Everyone emerges exhausted.

tier_1.title: Thin Ice
tier_1.description: The lake crossing looks solid but the creak underfoot says otherwise.
tier_1.success: You test each step. The safe path is slow but holds.
tier_1.failure: The ice gives. Someone goes under. Getting out costs a brutal half-day.

tier_1.title: Frozen Expedition Supplies
tier_1.description: A cairn of stones marks something buried. The previous travelers never came back for it.
tier_1.success: Frozen rations — still good. Enough for two days.
tier_1.failure: The cache is empty or the contents have rotted under the ice.

tier_2.title: Natural Ice Bridge
tier_2.description: A single arch of ice spans a crevasse. It's the only crossing for miles. The wind makes balance treacherous.
tier_2.success: You rope the party together and cross one at a time. Everyone makes it.
tier_2.failure: The bridge shifts underfoot. Someone falls — rope saves them but the delay is a full day.

tier_2.title: Polar Bear
tier_2.description: A mound of snow resolves into a massive white shape. It stands and locks eyes with you.
tier_2.success: You back away slowly and give it wide berth. It loses interest.
tier_2.failure: It charges. The snow makes retreat nearly impossible.

tier_3.title: Frost Giant Patrol
tier_3.description: Footprints the size of cart wheels press deep into the snow. Two figures crest the ridge ahead.
tier_3.success: You track their patrol pattern and slip through during the gap.
tier_3.failure: One turns and spots movement. They come down the ridge fast.

tier_3.title: Hidden Crevasse Field
tier_3.description: The whiteout is complete. Every surface looks identical. The glacier beneath you is riddled with hidden drops.
tier_3.success: You probe with poles and find a safe route through the field.
tier_3.failure: Three crevasse falls in quick succession. Ropes save lives but cost an entire day.

tier_4.title: Glacier Dungeon
tier_4.description: A cathedral of blue ice descends into the glacier. Something ancient and cold waits in the deepest chamber. The entrance is guarded by ice constructs.
tier_4.success: You study the construct patrol and find a maintenance tunnel that bypasses the outer guards.
tier_4.failure: The constructs detect you the moment you step inside.
tier_4.notes: On success the party enters the glacier dungeon with surprise. On failure they begin the dungeon combat-initiated.
